title: Authentication and Authorization Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on identity and access management.

questions.question: Regarding the web security, what is the primary role of 'Authentication'?
options: Correctly verifying exactly who a user is—such as through its login and its password

questions.question: Regarding the web security, what is 'Authorization' primarily used for?
options: Correctly and securely verifying exactly what an authenticated user is allowed to do—such as through its user roles and its permissions
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
